lon~ c(io)è:
34:48–34:50
per dire londra, o per dire alcune capitali,

44:46–44:46

45:44–45:45

46:08–46:10

TOR00646:14–46:14

TOI03146:15–46:16
e::hm
46:16–46:17
e quindi niente,

46:29–46:32

51:34–51:35
la sfera educativa.

53:12–53:14

53:14–53:15

53:15–53:20
